permissions.fallback_msg: This skill needs to execute shell commands (git, gh CLI, npm test, scripts) to perform Git operations. Please confirm before proceeding.
This skill needs to read local files and directories (e.g., repository contents, changelogs, scripts) within the workspace. Please confirm.
This skill may write or modify files in the workspace (e.g., resolving conflicts, creating worktree directories, writing scripts). Please confirm.
This skill needs to read version-controlled source files and repository history to support Git operations. Please confirm.
This skill may create or modify source code files (e.g., resolving rebase/merge conflicts, split-commit staging, partial cherry-pick checkout). Please confirm.
This skill creates or rewrites local Git commits, including interactive rebases, squashing, autosquash, split commits, and initial repository commits. Please confirm.
This skill pushes commits and rewritten history to remote repositories (including force-with-lease pushes and gh pr/release operations). Please confirm.
This skill uses the GitHub CLI (gh) to call GitHub API endpoints for managing PRs, issues, releases, secrets, and repository settings. Please confirm.
This skill may read secret values from environment variables (e.g., AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID) to set GitHub repository secrets via the gh CLI. Please confirm.
This skill uses 'gh secret set' to create or update repository secrets on GitHub. Please confirm before writing secret values.
This skill uses 'gh secret delete' to remove repository secrets from GitHub. Please confirm before deleting secrets.
This skill reads environment variables (e.g., $AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID) to supply values to GitHub secret management commands. Please confirm.
This skill makes outbound network requests via git remote operations (fetch, push, clone) and the GitHub CLI. Please confirm.
